title: Red Onion Kraken
description: A festive Norwegian dish featuring red onions that are kneaded and crisped up with a dash of friendly seasoning to create an intriguing, bitter and crispy snack.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, toss the thinly sliced red onions with salt and black pepper.
Drizzle in vegetable oil and mix well. Add garlic powder and smoked paprika; toss again until evenly distributed.
Spread the onion mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-30 minutes or until the onions are crisp and golden brown, tossing occasionally to prevent sticking.
Remove from oven and serve immediately.
